name: data_visualizer
description: Generate interactive, self-contained HTML visualizations from structured data. Produces a single .html file with embedded canvas-based charts — no external dependencies, works offline. Supports bar, line, pie, scatter, heatmap, timeline, and multi-chart dashboard layouts.

data.description: JSON string containing the chart data. Accepted formats vary by chart type — see tool docs. One of 'data' or 'data_file' is required.

data_file.description: Absolute path to a .json or .csv file. The file is loaded and parsed automatically. One of 'data' or 'data_file' is required.

title.description: Chart or dashboard title displayed at the top of the output. Default: 'Visualization'.

x_field.description: For bar/line/scatter: field name in each data record to use as the X axis / label. Auto-detected if omitted.

y_field.description: For bar/line/scatter: field name(s) to use as Y values. Comma-separate multiple names for multi-series charts (e.g. 'sales,costs'). Auto-detected if omitted.

output_path.description: Absolute path where the .html file is written. Defaults to the current working directory.

session_id.description: Optional session ID for log_manager integration.
